title: Emma Raducanu Gets Sick and Misses a Tennis Tournament
summary: Emma Raducanu is a famous tennis player from Britain who won a big tournament called the US Open in 2021. She was supposed to play in the Miami Open, a tennis event in Florida from March 17 to 29, but she had to withdraw because she is sick. She got ill last month while playing in the Middle East and still feels unwell with post-viral symptoms. Last week, she played in Indian Wells and reached the third round before losing. She decided it is best to take a break to recover fully. She will try to play again in three weeks at a tournament in Linz. Another British player, Sonay Kartal, also cannot play in Miami because of a back injury. Fran Jones, another British player, will play against Venus Williams, a famous American tennis player, in the first round.

being sick or not feeling well

background_read: Tennis is a sport where players hit a ball over a net. Tournaments like the Miami Open are big events where players compete to win. Emma Raducanu is a young British player who became famous by winning the US Open. Sometimes players get sick or injured and have to miss tournaments to recover. Venus Williams is a very famous American player who has won many tournaments.
Article_Structure: WHO: Emma Raducanu, a British tennis player, and other players like Sonay Kartal and Fran Jones.
WHAT: Emma Raducanu withdrew from the Miami Open due to illness, and Sonay Kartal is also out with a back injury; Fran Jones will play Venus Williams.
WHERE: The Miami Open is in Miami Gardens, Florida, USA.
WHY: To recover fully from post-viral symptoms and injuries, ensuring better health for future tournaments.

perspectives.description: Players prioritize recovery to avoid long-term health issues.
